topics.name: 100 - 200 Level: AE-FUNAI Science Foundation & Programming
topics.description: COS 101, COS 102, CSC 201, MTH 101, and General Studies at AE-FUNAI Ikwo.

subtopics.name: COS 101 & COS 102: Introduction to Computing Sciences (FUNAI)
objectives: Understand computing history, operating systems, and basic problem solving in Python

subtopics.name: CSC 201 & CSC 202: Object-Oriented Programming & Discrete Structures
objectives: Master OOP principles in Java/C++, discrete mathematics, logic gates, and Boolean algebra

topics.name: 300 - 400 Level: Advanced Systems, Cybersecurity, SIWES, and Project
topics.description: Data Structures, Database Systems, Computer Networks, Cybersecurity, and FUNAI Thesis.

subtopics.name: CSC 301 & CSC 302: Data Structures and Industrial Training
objectives: Implement advanced trees, graphs, sorting algorithms, and complete 6-month SIWES internship

subtopics.name: CSC 401 & CSC 499: Cybersecurity, Machine Learning, and Research Project
objectives: Study network security, cryptography, machine learning, and defend final year FUNAI B.Sc. thesis
